testcase.name: streamAll should handle repository failure on first page
save should return EntityWithMetadata when successful
streamAll should support count operation
saveAll should handle repository failure with non-empty collection
update should pass null transition directly to repository
updateByBusinessId should handle repository failure during find
deleteByBusinessId should return false when entity not found
getEntityStatsByState should return stats map when successful
search should call repository.findAllByCriteria with search condition
getEntityStatsByState with specific states should return filtered stats
search should handle repository failure
streamAll should stream all entities across multiple pages
deleteById should return entity ID when successful
saveAll should call repository.saveAll with non-empty collection
getById should handle repository failure gracefully
findByBusinessId should call repository.findAllByCriteria with correct search condition
updateAll should return empty list when no entities provided
getById should return EntityWithMetadata when successful
streamAll should respect pointInTime parameter
updateByBusinessId should handle entity not found
streamAll should provide accurate size estimation from the start
getEntityStatsByState should return empty map when no entities exist
streamAll should support filtering with stream operations
streamAll should support mapping with stream operations
update should use provided transition when not null
findAll should handle repository failure
getEntityStatsByState with pointInTime should return stats map when successful
deleteByBusinessId should successfully delete entity when found
save should handle repository failure gracefully
streamAll should handle repository failure on subsequent page
findByBusinessId should handle repository failure
saveAll should return empty list when no entities provided
update should handle repository failure gracefully
updateByBusinessId should successfully update entity when found
deleteAll should sum deletion counts correctly
updateAll should pass null transition directly to repository
deleteByBusinessId should handle repository failure during find
getItems should handle repository failure
streamAll should handle empty result set
deleteAll with model parameters should work correctly
deleteAll with model parameters should handle repository failure

deleteById should handle repository failure gracefully
findAll should call repository.findAll with correct model parameters
streamAll should handle single page result
